top_apps.name: Color Ball Escape: Puzzle
top_apps.description_short: Solve clever color-drop puzzles with no timer, no pressure, and pure strategy.
top_apps.description_excerpt:
Take on a relaxing but deeply satisfying puzzle challenge where every move matters. This color-based logic game is all about strategy, planning, and precision — with no timer and no pay-to-win pressure. Think at your own pace, test different approaches, and solve each level using skill.

Move colored holes around the board, line them up with matching marbles, and drop each marble into the correct hole. Clear all holes to complete the level. The rules are simple to learn, but the puzzles become increasingly clever and rewarding as you progress.

If you enjoy color matching, sorting puzzles, logic challenges, and brain-training games, this drop-and-match gameplay offers a fresh twist that keeps your mind engaged.

How to Play

Drag holes across the board

Match each hole with marbles of the same color

Position a hole under a marble to drop it

Collect all matching marbles to clear the hole

Remove every hole to finish the level

Features

No Timer Gameplay
Solve puzzles calmly without countdowns or rushing.

Skill-Based Challenge
Progress through logic-driven levels that reward planning and smart moves.

top_apps.name: Тоwer Rush
top_apps.description_short: Time your drops and keep the breathing tower stable
top_apps.description_excerpt:
Тоwer Rush is a timing-based building challenge where precision and rhythm determine how long your structure can stay stable. The tower is never completely still—it subtly “breathes,” shifting and moving as you prepare each placement. Your goal is to drop every falling block at the exact moment the structure is aligned, maintaining balance and preventing collapse.

The core gameplay is about syncing your actions with the tower’s movement pattern. You need to observe its rhythm, understand its flow, and release each block at the right phase. A mistimed drop can disturb the structure and create instability that makes further placement more difficult.

As the pace increases, the movement becomes faster and less predictable, reducing your timing window. Every successful drop requires sharper focus, better anticipation, and precise control. Each round becomes a continuous test of coordination, where staying in rhythm is the only way forward.

Every board is covered in arrows. Tap to rotate them until they point to open space and fly off. The controls could not be simpler. The catch is that you are racing a countdown, and every wrong tap costs you. Make too many mistakes and the level ends on the spot.

Early boards ease you in with a forgiving clock and plenty of breathing room. Later levels squeeze both your time and your mistake limit until you are planning three moves ahead while the seconds drop. The puzzles are handcrafted, so the difficulty ramp feels fair instead of randomly punishing.

top_apps.description_excerpt:
Welcome to Dominos Air Aviator, a domino chain game set in an aviation-themed world where four pilots compete in a relaxed, strategic match.

In each round, four pilots take turns playing. Every player starts with 7 domino tiles. On each turn, a tile can be placed only if one side matches the number at either open end of the domino chain on the table.

If a player has no valid move, they must pass the turn and wait for the next round.

The game continues as players build the domino chain step by step, making careful decisions and managing their tiles strategically.

top_apps.description_short: The latest Dragon Raja game! Dragon Academy RPG "Dragaku" is officially released!
top_apps.description_excerpt:
累計発行部数3000万部、全世界で爆発的な人気を誇るファンタジー小説「龍族」が群像劇RPGで登場！
AIアシスタント搭載、魅力的なキャラで爽快バトル、新たなIFルートで運命を廻せ！

▼没入感の高いストーリーとIFストーリー
世界中で大人気の原作小説を元に構築した300万文字を超える濃厚なストーリー。
豪華声優陣の熱演によりさまざまな名場面や名台詞を再現。
本作だけのオリジナルIFルートを多数実装し、全キャラとデートも可能に！
原作では描かれなかった未知なる可能性を、あなたの手で体験しよう！

▼今なら最大400連分無料ガチャ！ログインだけで全キャラ解放のチャンス！
キャラクターの収集ハードルは低めに設定！
ログインボーナスでは、恒常・限定を問わず多くのキャラクターが入手可能！
イベント報酬も充実！ 魅力的なキャラを仲間に迎え絆を深めよう！

▼セミオート王道RPG×策略×爽快バトル
キャラクターの編成や絆の発動など、あなたの戦略次第でバトルはより楽しく奥深く変化する！
オートプレイモードもあるので、カジュアルにも楽しめる！
キャラクターごとにバトル中の専用演出もあるので、爽快感UP！
策略を駆使して、言霊を放て！

▼デイリーミッションはAIにお任せ！
ゲーム内にはAI助手“ノルマ”を実装。
ボタンひとつで面倒なデイリーミッションなどをAIがオールクリア。キャラ育成も超簡単。
より快適に、より自由に、ストレスフリーで『ドラガク』を楽しめる！

▼世界を広げる豊富なイベントとコンテンツ
バトルやメインストーリー以外にも、数多くのミニゲームやサブストーリーを実装！
月毎にイベントも実装し、さまざまな角度から『ドラガク』の世界をディープに遊びつくそう！

▼豪華なサウンドと演出
テーマ曲《IVORY TOWER》はさまざまなアニメやドラマのサウンドを手掛ける澤野弘之氏が担当。

top_apps.name: DesiLudo
top_apps.description_short: Move your red, yellow, green, and blue pieces using strategy.
top_apps.description_excerpt:
The rules are very simple, anyone can start and quickly become a master.

At the start of the game, each player begins with four pieces on their starting square. During the game, players take turns rolling the dice. A 6 is rolled, and that player's piece is placed on their starting square. The main objective is to remove all four pieces from your side of the board before any of your opponents.

- A piece can only move when a 6 is rolled.
- Players take turns rolling the dice. If a player rolls a 6, they get another chance to roll.
- All pieces must reach the center of the board to win the game.
- Pieces move clockwise based on the number rolled on the dice.
- Knocking down an opponent's piece grants an extra chance to roll the dice.

Spending happy times together, constantly improving your chess skills, showcasing your personal talents, and becoming a master player!

Three vertical reels filled with vibrant fruits and rare symbols rotate nonstop, and your goal is to stop each column at the perfect moment to create winning combinations along the center line.

Every round tests your reactions and precision. Tap the reels one by one to lock their position and match identical symbols in the middle row. Cherries, lemons, grapes, and watermelons bring progress, while the rare crown symbol unlocks the chance for a powerful Royal Win. Even partial matches can help you move forward, but perfect combinations are the key to victory.

As the game continues, the reels spin faster and become harder to control, demanding sharper timing and better concentration. Some columns may continue moving slightly after a tap, adding an extra layer of challenge and unpredictability to every spin. To win, you must achieve three successful full matches in a row or land three crowns in a single attempt before mistakes or the timer end your run.

top_apps.name: Teen Patti Master Game
top_apps.description_short: A three-card poker game based on the classic Teen Patti rules.
top_apps.description_excerpt: Teen Patti Master Game delivers a traditional three-card gameplay experience based on classic Teen Patti rules, where players compete to form the highest-ranking hand and make strategic betting decisions in every round. The game focuses on card strength, timing, and player judgment. Each round begins with players receiving three cards and choosing to play blind or seen. Players can call, raise, or fold depending on their confidence and reading of the table. Understanding hand rankings such as Trail (three of a kind), Pure Sequence, Sequence, Color, Pair, and High Card is essential for making effective decisions. The gameplay emphasizes observing opponents, managing bets, and choosing the right moments to continue or exit a round. As the pot increases, players must balance risk and reward while adapting to different situations. Players earn in-game currency through gameplay, which can be used to access different tables, gameplay variations, and additional features, expanding the overall experience. This game does not include any real money or any opportunities to win real money or real-world rewards. It is purely a simulation game where players earn and use virtual currency only.

Clear the grid. Clear your mind. 🌿
Arrow Zen is a puzzle game designed to feel like a breathing exercise. Each level is a grid of tangled arrows. Your task is to find the one with an open path, tap it, and watch it glide away in silence. One by one, the clutter dissolves. The grid empties. Your thoughts settle.
There's no timer counting down. No leaderboard pushing you to rush. No flashing alerts or combo streaks demanding your attention. Just a quiet space where the only thing that matters is the next move.
🌙 A MOMENT OF STILLNESS
Most puzzle games want your adrenaline. Arrow Zen wants your attention — the gentle, unhurried kind. The kind you feel when you sit with a cup of tea and watch the steam rise. Tap an arrow. Watch it leave. Notice the space it opens. Breathe.
Each level is a small meditation. You study the grid. You notice which arrows depend on others. You find the thread to pull, and slowly, patiently, you untangle everything. The last arrow slides away, the screen goes quiet, and for a moment — nothing needs solving.
🍃 DESIGNED FOR CALM
Every detail in Arrow Zen exists to reduce noise, not add it:

top_apps.name: Tower Rush
top_apps.description_short: Guide falling parts, match 4, and keep every tower neat!
top_apps.description_excerpt: Tower Rush is a smooth casual puzzler that turns tower-style visuals into fast, readable gameplay. Each round is built around three towers, where falling stacking bricks need to be guided into the right stack. When four of the same line up in a stack, you score a point. If different types land where they should not, one life is gone. There are two ways to play: a survival mode that keeps going until your lives run out, and a progression mode with 100 levels that get tougher over time. You also get settings, a simple dashboard, and a rules page whenever you want a quick refresher. What gives Tower Rush its charm is the clean flow from one move to the next. Tower Rush rewards attention without feeling stressful, keeps Tower Rush approachable for new players, and lets Tower Rush deliver that nice “one more try” feeling almost every time. 🚀

In an apocalypse, no one survives alone. Recruit warriors with different specialties and build the ultimate squad. Strategy and teamwork are your only path to survival.

Every gate is a gamble between life and death. Choose right, and you'll find supplies. Choose wrong, and face the horde. Time is short, so you must decide fast. ​Only the smartest and toughest will achieve redemption!​​

The stronger your weapon, the better your chances. But fate is fickle; survival also depends on luck.

​- Conquer Powerful Enemies​

top_apps.name: Unajua?: Kenyan Party Game

top_apps.description_excerpt:
Unajua is a Kenyan party game for friends and family. Play charades with local slang, culture, food and everyday life from Nairobi to Mombasa. Perfect for game nights, hangouts and any time you need a fun multiplayer game.**

Ugali and sukuma wiki. Matatu graffiti. Boda boda negotiations. Safari adventures. Sheng phrases your parents don’t understand. It’s all in here.

The rules are simple. Place your phone on your forehead, screen facing out. Your friends describe the word while you guess. Get it right, tilt forward. Stuck? Tilt back to skip. Fast, chaotic and perfect for party games with friends.

Whether it’s a choma spot hangout, a family gathering in shags, a birthday party, or just a random evening that needs some energy, Unajua turns any moment into a game night. Hundreds of Kenyan-themed charades cards across multiple categories mean you’ll never run out of fun!!!

top_apps.name: Imposter AI: Party Game
top_apps.description_short: Bluff, vote & find the spy! Social deduction party game with AI & online play
top_apps.description_excerpt:
imposter.ai is the social deduction party game where bluffing and guessing collide — now with Party Mode, Online Play, and AI-powered custom categories.

Pass the phone around your group. Each player scans their finger to see a secret word. But one person is the Imposter — they have no idea what the word is. Can you find them before they fool everyone?

Simple to learn. Impossible to stop playing.

HOW TO PLAY

1. Add 3-12 players and pick a category
2. Pass the phone — each player scans to see the secret word
3. One player is secretly the Imposter and sees nothing
4. Everyone gives a one-word clue to prove they know the secret
5. The Imposter listens, bluffs, and tries to blend in
6. Vote on who you think is lying — find the Imposter to win!

No boards. No extra pieces. Just one phone and your friends.

THREE WAYS TO PLAY

Classic Mode
Pass the phone and bluff your way through. The original social deduction experience — perfect for game nights, road trips, and parties.

Party Mode — NEW
Unique roles, multi-round elimination voting, and next-level chaos. The ultimate party game experience for gro...
